answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like solving complex problems and thinking analytically
Balanced — good pay and meaningful work

milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in game developer to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: Unity Certified Programmer Exam Preparation and Certification
Unreal Engine Learning Library (Official Courses and Learning Paths)
Game Design and Development Specialization by Michigan State University (Coursera)
Professional Certificate in Game Development MicroBachelors Program by NYU Tandon (edX)

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in c++ or c# programming, game engines (unity, unreal engine), and 3d math and physics — these are the essential building blocks for a game developer

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in gameplay programming, graphics rendering, and version control (git, perforce), applying them through exercises and case studies

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying c++ or c# programming, and game engines (unity, unreal engine) in realistic scenarios

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your game developer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for game developer positions on job boards, company career pages, and freelance platforms (Upwork, Fiverr, Toptal) — tailor each application to the role and be ready to showcase your portfolio in interviews
